creator: admin@canonicaldev.com
text:
===>  Installing for dmake-4.12.2
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if devel/dmake already installed
Making install in startup
Making install in unix
Making install in linux
test -z "/usr/local/share/dmake/startup/unix/linux" || /bin/sh ../../../mkinstalldirs "/usr/local/share/dmake/startup/unix/linux"
mkdir /usr/local/share/dmake
mkdir /usr/local/share/dmake/startup
mkdir /usr/local/share/dmake/startup/unix
mkdir /usr/local/share/dmake/startup/unix/linux
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 'macros.mk' '/usr/local/share/dmake/startup/unix/linux/macros.mk'
test -z "/usr/local/share/dmake/startup/unix" || /bin/sh ../../mkinstalldirs "/usr/local/share/dmake/startup/unix"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 'macros.mk' '/usr/local/share/dmake/startup/unix/macros.mk'
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 'recipes.mk' '/usr/local/share/dmake/startup/unix/recipes.mk'
test -z "/usr/local/share/dmake/startup" || /bin/sh ../mkinstalldirs "/usr/local/share/dmake/startup"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 'startup.mk' '/usr/local/share/dmake/startup/startup.mk'
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 'config.mk' '/usr/local/share/dmake/startup/config.mk'
Making install in tests
test -z "/usr/local/bin" || /bin/sh ./mkinstalldirs "/usr/local/bin"
  install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 'dmake' '/usr/local/bin/dmake'
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/ports/devel/dmake/work/dmake-4.12.2/man/dmake.tf /usr/local/man/man1/dmake.1
